message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. I need to verify identity before proceeding: please confirm the full name on the account or the last 2 digits of the phone number.
Neha Verma. I’m unemployed right now, so I can’t make any payment this month.
Verified. Account ****1184 shows a current amount due of 8400. You stated you are unemployed and cannot make any payment this month. Is income expected within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in 21 days. I can’t commit to a payment right now.

Noted. Your unemployment and no-income status indicate ongoing hardship. No payment commitment is recorded. The account will be routed for hardship review. You will be contacted by phone regarding next steps for this account.
Handoff
